steps.title: Match the display contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts Hernandez's early murals displayed in outdoor public spaces with her works now in museums. The blank should mean displayed or presented in those museum settings.

steps.title: Rule out wrong meanings
steps.content: A means brought into existence, not shown in museums. B means modified. D means endorsed or suggested. None fits the contrast between outdoor display and museum display. The answer is C.
